prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
T-005 has been logging elevated load current readings over the past week. Retrieve the recent sensor data and determine whether current readings are abnormally high relative to the recent baseline, and flag the peak recorded value and when it occurred.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should retrieve load current readings for T-005, compute or reference a recent baseline, state whether readings are elevated above that baseline, and report the peak value and timestamp.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "detect_anomalies",
        "arguments": {
          "transformer_id": "T-005",
          "sensor_id": "load_current_a",
          "window_size": "7",
          "z_threshold": "2.0"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-853265a80a0ae840",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-005\",\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"window_size\": 7,\n  \"z_threshold\": 2.0,\n  \"total_readings\": 720,\n  \"anomaly_count\": 7,\n  \"anomaly_rate_pct\": 0.97,\n  \"anomalies\": [\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2024-01-03 19:00:00\",\n      \"value\": 147.458,\n      \"z_score\": 2.104\n    },\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2024-01-06 01:00:00\",\n      \"value\": 123.999,\n      \"z_score\": 2.078\n    },\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2024-01-06 22:00:00\",\n      \"value\": 302.349,\n      \"z_score\": 2.026\n    },\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2024-01-07 15:00:00\",\n      \"value\": 113.952,\n      \"z_score\": 2.163\n    },\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2024-01-09 10:00:00\",\n      \"value\": 56.601,\n      \"z_score\": 2.17\n    },\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2024-01-22 20:00:00\",\n      \"value\": 107.459,\n      \"z_score\": 2.021\n    },\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2024-01-26 19:00:00\",\n      \"value\": 267.569,\n      \"z_score\": 2.042\n    }\n  ]\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The recent sensor data has been retrieved, and the current readings were found to be abnormally high relative to the recent baseline. The peak recorded value was 302.349 A, which occurred on 2024-01-06 22:00:00.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The recent sensor data has been retrieved, and the current readings were found to be abnormally high relative to the recent baseline. The peak recorded value was 302.349 A, which occurred on 2024-01-06 22:00:00.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": true, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": true, "agent_sequence_correct": true, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": ""}
